name: VoiceControl
description: Control GD with your voice or any sound via microphone

sensitivity.name: Microphone Sensitivity
sensitivity.description: RMS threshold to trigger input. Lower = more sensitive.

press_debounce_ms.name: Press Debounce (ms)
press_debounce_ms.description: Minimum sound duration to register as input

release_debounce_ms.name: Release Debounce (ms)
release_debounce_ms.description: Silence duration required to release a held input

allow_touch_too.name: Keep Touch Input
allow_touch_too.description: If true, voice AND touch both work simultaneously

show_volume_indicator.name: Show Volume Bar
show_volume_indicator.description: Show a real-time microphone volume bar in-game
